response.overview: Created by José Trinidad, Zahira immerses us in an epic fantasy story that follows a young woman banished from her tribe, the Zun-Tara, who embarks on a journey marked by destiny, danger, and the discovery of her true purpose.  In a world threatened by the dreaded Dark Age, dominated by devastating creatures and the Zayas tribe, Zahira becomes the hope of her people. Along her path, she will discover the power within her and the meaning of an ancient prophecy that names her "The Chosen Flame," destined to save her people and the entire continent.
response.title: Zahira: The Chosen Flame
